items.name: photoshop-smart-layer-manager
items.description: Advanced layer organization and automation plugin for Adobe Photoshop CC 2024+. Intelligent grouping, bulk renaming, hierarchy detection, and smart layer management powered by adaptive algorithms. Works with design systems, production pipelines, and complex document structures. Native UXP extension.

items.name: pdf-batch-processor
items.description: Advanced batch processing automation extension for Adobe Acrobat Pro. Intelligent document handling, metadata extraction, watermarking, and PDF optimization with adaptive algorithms. Streamline your document workflows.

items.name: ae-animation-expressions
items.description: Professional expression-based animation framework for After Effects 2024+.  Automates text sequencing, layer synchronization, and motion keyframe generation  with intelligent timing algorithms and adaptive animation presets. Built for motion  designers, video producers, and animation studios.

items.name: ae-expression-library
items.description: Production-ready expression toolkit for Adobe After Effects 2024+. Advanced property linking, dynamic text animation, sophisticated camera control, adaptive layer management, and automated timing solutions. Real-time preview with interactive UI panel. Built for motion designers, VFX artists, and broadcast production teams.

items.name: vegas-pro-ai-upscaler
items.description: Intelligent video enhancement plugin for Sony Vegas Pro. Neural upscaling (2x-4x),  adaptive noise reduction, motion-aware sharpening, and frame interpolation.  Professional-grade restoration for filmmakers, editors & studios.

items.name: fl-studio-plugin-commander
items.description: Advanced MIDI control and intelligent workflow automation suite for FL Studio 21+. Real-time parameter mapping, adaptive effect chaining, MIDI learning, and production profile management. Streamline your workflow with intelligent automation.

items.name: WeMod-Pro-Patcher
items.description: Patcher for WeMod (wemod.com) — the popular game trainer and mod platform developed by WeMod Inc (founded 2016). Unlocks WeMod Pro subscription features including remote cheats, ad-free experience, custom hotkey bindings, priority support access, and early access to new game trainers.

items.name: spixy
items.description: Свой лаунчер для Minecraft-сервера без кода: конструктор .exe-лаунчера с модами и автообновлением, сайт, донат-магазин, RCON. No-code Minecraft server launcher builder.

items.name: CET_Complaint_Callstack_Spoofing
items.description: A proof of concept that makes a Windows syscall look like it came from a legitimate Windows thread pool, with no trace of your own code anywhere in the call stack. It also stays compliant with Intel CET (Control-flow Enforcement Technology), which is the hardware feature that kills most naive stack spoofing tricks.
